appliedRows.title: Guillaume Lample
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Guillaume Lample cofounded Mistral AI in 2023... The French AI researcher met his future cofounder Arthur Mensch while studying at Paris' elite college École Polytechnique. Selection reason: 福布斯权威资料页，明确提及Guillaume Lample是Mistral AI联合创始人，并包含其职业背景，可作为人物身份与职位的可靠佐证。 Source preview: PROFILE Guillaume Lample $1.8B Real Time Net Worth as of 6/9/26 Reflects change since 5 pm ET of prior trading day. #2275 in the world today From the Editor Last Updated Mar 10, 2026, 1:01am EDT Guillaume Lample cofounded Mistral AI in 2023 raising $113 million from investors in what was then Europe's largest ever seed round. ​​The Paris-based company builds open-weight large language models that compete with U.S. rivals like OpenAI, and raised $2 billion on a $14 billion valuation in September 2025. The French AI researcher met his future cofounder Arthur Mensch while studying at Paris' elite college École Polytechnique. Lample would later complete a master's degree in artificial intellige... MiMo rationale: 原始来源仅为一个X帖子URL，缺乏具体信息。候选中Forbes资料页和Google Scholar主页是权威来源，能直接证明Guillaume Lample作为Mistral AI联合创始人及AI研究者的身份，可补强原始来源的薄弱信息。其他候选来源权威性不足或与本人关联不直接。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Guillaume Lample directly. | Source must support why "//x.com/GuillaumeLample/status/1864251684852998621" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: A New Chapter for fast.ai: How To Solve It With Code – Answer.AI
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Author Jeremy Howard Published November 7, 2024 ... we’re excited to announce that fast.ai is joining Answer.AI, and we’re announcing a new kind of educational experience, ‘How To Solve It With Code’ Selection reason: Answer.AI官方文章，由Jeremy Howard撰写，宣布课程发布，是权威的一手来源。 Source preview: A New Chapter for fast.ai: How To Solve It With Code ai education open-source tech fast.ai is joining Answer.AI, and we’re announcing a new kind of educational experience, ‘How To Solve It With Code’ Author Jeremy Howard Published November 7, 2024 Eight years ago, Rachel Thomas and I launched fast.ai with a mission to democratize artificial intelligence. We believed AI would become one of the most significant technologies in history, and, if widely distributed, felt like it could empower people all around the world to create anything they could imagine. But if only a small elite understood it, we worried it could lead to inequality. Today, we’re excited to announce that fast.ai is joining A... Selection reason: 可靠媒体采访，标题和描述明确提及Jeremy Howard与FastHTML的发布，提供权威背景信息。 Source preview: Latent.Space Latent.Space Latent.Space Latent.Space AI Magic: Shipping 1000s of successful products with no managers and a team of 12 — Jeremy Howard of Answer.ai Disclaimer: We recorded this episode ~1.5 months ago, timing for the FastHTML release. It then got bottlenecked by Llama3.1, Winds of AI Winter, and SAM2 episodes, so we’re a little late. Since then FastHTML was released, swyx is building an app in it for AINews, and Anthropic has also released their prompt caching API. Remember when Dylan Patel of SemiAnalysis coined the GPU Rich vs GPU Poor war? (if not, see our pod with him). The idea was that if you’re GPU poor you shouldn’t waste your time trying to solve GPU rich problems (i... appliedRows.title: fast.ai - How to Solve it With Code course now available
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Author Jeremy Howard Published October 15, 2025 ... I had planned to send this email a year ago to let you know you could sign up for our new fast.ai course, “How to Solve it With Code” Selection reason: fast.ai官方博客文章，由Jeremy Howard撰写，明确宣布课程上线，直接证明其与课程的关系。 Source preview: How to Solve it With Code course now available An email sent to all fast.ai forum users. courses Author Jeremy Howard Published October 15, 2025 tl/dr: This is a copy of a one-off email I sent to all fast.ai forum users, with a long-overdue update. I had planned to send this email a year ago to let you know you could sign up for our new fast.ai course, “How to Solve it With Code”, but by the time I woke up the day after launching it, it was full. :O The good news is that we’ve spent the last year making it much better, and a brand new version is ready to go now. You can jump straight to it here: solve.it.com . It’s designed mainly for experienced coders, AI practitioners, and data scientist... appliedRows.title: FastHTML: Modern web applications in pure Python – Answer.AI
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: FastHTML: Modern web applications in pure Python FastHTML is a new way to create modern interactive web apps. It scales down to a 6-line python file, and scales up to complex production apps. Jeremy Howard August 3, 2024 Selection reason: 官方博客文章，由Jeremy Howard撰写，明确介绍FastHTML框架，直接证明其与作品的关系。 Source preview: FastHTML: Modern web applications in pure Python FastHTML is a new way to create modern interactive web apps. It scales down to a 6-line python file, and scales up to complex production apps. Jeremy Howard August 3, 2024 > This content is cross-posted from fastht.ml. Updates will be posted there. About FastHTML FastHTML is a new way to create modern interactive web apps. It scales down to a 6-line python file, and scales up to complex production apps. Auth, DBs, caching, styling, etc are all built-in, and replaceable and extensible. 1-click deploy is available to Railway, Vercel, Huggingface, and more—or deploy to any Python server or VPS, including Azure, GCP, and AWS. Getting started If y... appliedRows.title: Marc Andreessen's 2026 Outlook… - The a16z Show - Apple Podcasts
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: a16z co-founder and General Partner Marc Andreessen joins an AMA-style conversation to explain why AI is the largest technology shift he has experienced... Selection reason: Apple Podcasts页面明确显示Marc Andreessen参与了关于2026年AI展望的播客讨论，直接关联人物与预测内容。 Source preview: The a16z Show Marc Andreessen's 2026 Outlook: AI Timelines, US vs. China, and The Price of AI a16z co-founder and General Partner Marc Andreessen joins an AMA-style conversation to explain why AI is the largest technology shift he has experienced, how the cost of intelligence is collapsing, and why the market still feels early despite rapid adoption. The discussion covers how falling model costs and fast capability gains are reshaping pricing, distribution, and competition across the AI stack, why usage-based and value-based pricing are becoming standard, and how startups and incumbents are navigating big versus small models and open versus closed systems. Marc also addresses China’s progre... appliedRows.title: Oriol Vinyals | MIT Technology Review
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: When he was 15 years old, Oriol Vinyals became obsessed with StarCraft, a video game in which three factions vie for control of the map—like chess if it were played not only with black and white pieces but also with red ones. Vinyals soon became the top-ranked player in Spain. Selection reason: 权威媒体人物简介，明确提及Oriol Vinyals与游戏（StarCraft）的关联，直接支持“Life is like a game”这一主题。 Source preview: Skip to Content MIT Technology Review Featured Topics Newsletters Events Audio MIT Technology Review Featured Topics Newsletters Events Audio Pioneers Pushing the edge of science, these innovators are creating new approaches to tackling technology challenges. Age: : 33 Affiliation: : Google DeepMind Showing computers how to learn might seem like a game, but it’s also serious business. When he was 15 years old, Oriol Vinyals became obsessed with StarCraft, a video game in which three factions vie for control of the map—like chess if it were played not only with black and white pieces but also with red ones. Vinyals soon became the top-ranked player in Spain. “I almost knew the game would ret... appliedRows.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says AI will reshape society ... - ABC News
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: The CEO behind the company that created ChatGPT believes artificial intelligence technology will reshape society... "We've got to be careful here," said Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI. Selection reason: ABC News的独家采访，明确Sam Altman作为OpenAI CEO的身份，并讨论AI对社会的影响，来源可靠。 Source preview: Live Video Shows Good Morning America ShopGMA Stream on stream logo OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says AI will reshape society, acknowledges risks: 'A little bit scared of this' "This will be the greatest technology humanity has yet developed," he said. The CEO behind the company that created ChatGPT believes artificial intelligence technology will reshape society as we know it. He believes it comes with real dangers, but can also be "the greatest technology humanity has yet developed" to drastically improve our lives. "We've got to be careful here," said Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI. "I think people should be happy that we are a little bit scared of this." Altman sat down for an exclusive interview w... appliedRows.title: Reflections - Sam Altman
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: The second birthday of ChatGPT was only a little over a month ago... As we get closer to AGI, it feels like an important time to look at the progress of our company. Selection reason: Sam Altman的个人博客，直接证明其作为OpenAI CEO的身份及对AGI、ChatGPT发展的反思，权威性高。 Source preview: Reflections - Sam Altman ManageEdit PostLogoutLogin Sam Altman «Back to blog Reflections The second birthday of ChatGPT was only a little over a month ago, and now we have transitioned into the next paradigm of models that can do complex reasoning. New years get people in a reflective mood, and I wanted to share some personal thoughts about how it has gone so far, and some of the things I’ve learned along the way. As we get closer to AGI, it feels like an important time to look at the progress of our company. There is still so much to understand, still so much we don’t know, and it’s still so early. But we know a lot more than we did when we started. We started OpenAI almost nine years ago ... appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Jensen Huang founded NVIDIA in 1993 and has served since its inception as president, chief executive officer, and a member of the board of directors. NVIDIA is now driving the platform shift of accelerated computing and generative AI, transforming the world's largest industries and profoundly...
